---
name: Register new PURL type
about: Document requirements to register a new PURL type
title: 'Register new PURL type: '
labels: Proposed new type
assignees: ''

---

This is an issue template for registering a new PURL **type**. Registration is our name for the 
process to create a new PURL **type** definition.

See https://www.packageurl.org/docs/purl/purl-types for overview information about PURL **types**.

To request registration of a new PURL **type** you should be able to able to explain:
- [ ] Why is this new PURL **type** needed?
- [ ] What are the PURL component level definitions?
- [ ] What input do you have from the relevant package ecosystem/community?
- [ ] Are there any open questions or concerns about this new PURL **type**?

A draft PR is a good way to document the PURL component level definitions 
in the format of a `<purl-type>.definition.json` file, but a PR is not a 
substitute for an issue because an issue should be the primary forum for the 
initial discussion.

A PR to register a new PURL **type** will normally require relevant **type**-specific test cases.

*NB: This is the first draft of this template.*
